type_error_policy: Pycairo runtime TypeError assertions map to MoonBit compile-time rejection. Every such upstream test must retain a full generated signature in static_api or an explicit forbidden signature in static_absent, plus runtime evidence for valid behavior.

test_raster_source.adaptation: RasterSourcePattern is represented by opaque Pattern plus checked raster methods; raster_set_acquire preserves pycairo's required acquire argument while raster_set_callbacks expresses its explicit None callback states; Python inheritance checks have no MoonBit runtime equivalent.
